calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-30-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kenneth Hillier appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The Court asked Mr. Hillier why he hasn't responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Hillier stated that they have been searching for proof that the accounts were opened prior to the assignment, that they subsequently have been unable to find any proof and that he tried to contact the Examiner last week to request that the matter be taken off calendar. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
